_comment: Codex CLI hooks. Codex hook events are SessionStart, UserPromptSubmit, PreToolUse, PostToolUse, PermissionRequest, Stop. There is NO SessionEnd. Hook commands need absolute paths — install.sh writes a copy of this file at ~/.codex/hooks.json with __VIBELOG_ROOT__ replaced. Codex hooks require `codex_hooks = true` under [features] in ~/.codex/config.toml.
